states.name: declared
states.description: Provider Instance is defined for one local Node generation or approved remote-service boundary but is not materialized.
entry_requirements: Provider Revision, exact locality and configuration references are recorded.

states.name: starting
states.description: Provider materialization/startup or remote binding is in progress.
entry_requirements: Start Activity/Attempt and intended Provider generation are recorded.

states.name: running
states.description: Provider process/service incarnation or approved remote binding exists; readiness and health remain separate observations.
entry_requirements: Startup/binding Receipt and current Provider generation are recorded.

states.name: draining
states.description: Provider accepts no ordinary new work while existing work is reconciled.
entry_requirements: Drain policy and active work/leases are recorded.

states.name: stopping
states.description: Provider shutdown, unbinding or cleanup is in progress.
entry_requirements: Stop Activity and cleanup expectations are recorded.

states.name: stopped
states.description: Provider incarnation is not running/bound and cannot accept work until a new generation starts.
entry_requirements: Shutdown/unbinding and cleanup Receipts are retained.

states.name: failed
states.description: A receipted Provider incarnation failure is durable; health and uncertain side effects remain separate and require reconciliation.
entry_requirements: Failure evidence, exact generation and recovery/cleanup policy are retained.

states.name: quarantined
states.description: Provider Instance is isolated from dispatch pending security, integrity or policy review.
entry_requirements: Quarantine reason and isolation scope are recorded.

states.name: retired
states.description: Provider Instance identity is retained but cannot start another generation.
entry_requirements: No active attempts/leases remain and retention/cleanup is recorded.

required_preconditions: Provider Revision and exactly one local-Node or remote-service assignment are valid.
Local Node authority or remote-service authority, compatible capability evidence and a new monotonic Provider generation are fixed.
Startup/binding Receipt and process/service/remote alias evidence exist; readiness remains separate.
New dispatch is blocked and active work handling is recorded.
Stop/unbind/cleanup Activity and treatment of active work are recorded.
Process/service absence or remote unbinding and cleanup/read-back are verified.
Failure source, generation and uncertain operations are retained for reconciliation.
Dispatch is blocked, affected credentials/network/leases are fenced and reason is retained.
No active work/leases remain and cleanup/retention is complete.
